title: 04138_GibbsDDRM_A_Partially_Collapsed_Gibbs_Sampler_for_Solving_Blind_Inverse_Problems_with_Denoising_Diffusion_Restoration
positive_examples: GibbsDDRM achieves high performance on blind image deblurring, which can enhance image quality in various applications such as photography and medical imaging.
The method also performs well in vocal dereverberation, improving audio quality for applications in music and communication.
